---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new rule, check, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Example: "My AGENTS.md has X pattern that isn't caught..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the rule or feature you'd like added.

## Example

Show an example `AGENTS.md` snippet that should trigger this check.

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or examples.

## Scope check

v0.1 is grounded verification only — Node/npm/pnpm command grounding
against `package.json` scripts, `packageManager`, lockfiles, and pnpm
workspaces. Out-of-scope for v0.1 (no command execution, no prose
mining, no LLM checks, no vulnerability detection, no auto-fix). See
[ROADMAP.md](https://github.com/northgardtracker/rootmark/blob/main/ROADMAP.md).
